hero.title: Discover & Create with
hero.description: Explore a curated collection of Gemini 3 Pro prompts and templates. Generate stunning visuals, remix existing styles, and build your personal library.

search.placeholder: Search templates by title or prompt...

empty.libraryEmpty: You haven't created any templates yet. Start creating to build your personal collection.

save.title: Save to Gallery
save.description: Give your creation a memorable title.

exitConfirm.title: Unsaved Changes
exitConfirm.description: You have unsaved work. Are you sure you want to discard it and leave?

login.joinDesc: Create your profile to start generating.
login.emailHint: Please enter a valid email address

errors.wrongCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please check and try again.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address first. Check your inbox (including spam folder).
errors.userNotFound: This email is not registered. Please sign up first.
errors.loginFailed: Login failed. Please try again later.
errors.noUserInfo: Login failed. Could not retrieve user information.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.emailExists: This email is already registered. Please use a different email or login directly.
errors.registerFailed: Registration failed. Please try again later.
errors.noUserCreated: Registration failed. User was not created.
errors.registerSuccessNoProfile: Registration successful, but could not retrieve profile. Please try logging in later.
errors.insufficientCreditsError: Insufficient credits. Need {needed} credits, but you have {have}.
errors.apiKeyNotConfigured: API Key not configured. Please set GEMINI_API_KEY in .env.local
errors.apiKeyInvalid: Invalid API Key. Please check GEMINI_API_KEY in .env.local
errors.networkError: Network connection failed. Please check your network or API availability.
errors.apiForbidden: API access denied. Please check API Key permissions or quota.
errors.rateLimited: API rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
errors.deductFailed: Credit deduction failed. Please try again.
